nonGoals: Do not rename @a5c-ai/agent-runtime or packages/agent-runtime in issue #836.
Do not rename @a5c-ai/tula-platform or packages/tula/platform in issue #836.
Do not rename the agent-core runtime harness terminology unless it is specifically package/workspace identity.
Do not change behavior of the agent runtime or harness invocation paths beyond references needed for the package rename.

phasePlan.objective: Rename workspace package identity and directory with tests proving package metadata and exports are correct.
Update workspace dependencies, imports, re-exports, mocks, and TypeScript project references in dependent packages.
Update CI, release workflows, docs, atlas graph references, and regenerated package-lock entries.

intentionalTerminologyExamples: logs or errors that identify the built-in agent-core worker
